title: Be able to natively extract data from incoming emails

posts.author: JonathanJ (Jonathan Juncker)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,

Following my discussion with monday support team, it is not currently possible to copy the sender email from a received email to a column of type email in a board.
It would be really helpful to be able to do so when an item is created in a board using the gmail/outlook integration “when email received”.
This feature would allow to trigger other automation such as “match automations” etc…

Thank you in advance.
Kind regards,

Jonathan J.

posts.author: Nir-Jetpack (Nir @ Jetpack Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
@JonathanJ Extract updates app does that. With Extract you can copy the sender email from a received email to a column of type email in a board.

Screen Shot 2022-12-19 at 17.09.28726×556 28.2 KB
